Here is a translation that needs improvement:
=== TRANSLATION START ===
{content}
=== TRANSLATION END ===

Here is the quality assessment:
=== JUDGEMENT START ===
{judgement}
=== JUDGEMENT END ===

Please produce a corrected version of the translation that fixes all issues listed in the judgement.
Apply every correction as specified. 
For any new word with conflicts, change it exactly how specified by the judgement.

Do NOT introduce any new grammar rules beyond what is implied by the feature vector and affix inventory.

Return ONLY JSON in this structure:

{{
  "sentences": [
    {{
      "conlang_sentence": "<corrected_sentence>",
      "gloss": "<corrected_gloss>",
      "new_words": [
        {{
          "word": "<form>",
          "pos": "<pos>",
          "translation": "<english>"
        }}
      ]
    }}
  ]
}}

If no new words are required, return "new_words": [].
